zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Saye於大約1130年出生時，他的父親Hugh FitzOsbern37歲，母親Eustachia Saye25歲。他於1152年與Lucia de Clifford在英國賀福爾克利福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1190年9月29日在英國賀福爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Saye于大约1130年出生时，他的父亲Hugh FitzOsbern37岁，母亲Eustachia Saye25岁。他于1152年与Lucia de Clifford在英国賀福爾克利福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1190年9月29日在英国賀福爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Saye was born about 1130, his father, Hugh FitzOsbern, was 37 and his mother, Eustachia Saye, was 25. He married Lucia de Clifford in 1152, in Clifford, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 September 1190, in Herefordshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Saye est né environ 1130, son père, Hugh FitzOsbern, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eustachia Saye, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lucia de Clifford en 1152, à Clifford, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1190, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Saye(이)가 대략 1130년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh FitzOsbern(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustachia Saye(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1152년 영국 허퍼드실르 클리퍼드에서 Lucia de Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 9월 29일 영국 허퍼드실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Saye родился около 1130 г., его отцу по имени Hugh FitzOsbern было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustachia Saye, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia de Clifford в 1152 г. в местности клиффорд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 сентября 1190 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.
